headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录272篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目39篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（76篇）。其中10%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ DeusData /codebase-memory-mcp：High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph —

▸ Panniantong /Agent-Reach：Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, 

▸ obra /superpowers：An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

▸ google-research /timesfm：TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Goo

▸ continuedev /continue：open-source coding agent
text: 今日共收录272篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究191篇, 开源项目39篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（76篇）。其中10%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
